decision.overall_recommendation: VIX gate is open, so new entries are permissible, but this shortlist should be traded selectively rather than all at once. BB and BTDR are the strongest candidates on SmartScore and trade-plan quality; BTDR's own ML model disagrees with its setup (negative_ml_edge), so treat it as a smaller/confirmation-needed entry. CORZ and CIFR both carry an independent bearish Double Top pattern flag despite respectable SmartScores/R:R — these read as monitor-only or avoid-long until the pattern is invalidated. AVTR is the weakest overall (lowest score, weakest R:R, two caution flags, mixed weekly/daily trend). Three of five names are Technology (BB, BTDR, CORZ), so avoid stacking full-size positions across all of them same-day; existing Webull holdings are logged only as 'Unknown' sector so no direct overlap can be confirmed, but the shortlist's own concentration is a risk to manage. No earnings-date conflicts flagged (buffer already applied upstream). ML track record sample size is insufficient, so MLEdge flags below are taken at face value rather than adjusted for model reliability.

ranked_picks.rationale: Top SmartScore (97), confirmed Breakout setup, 100% timeframe alignment, and a bullish Double Bottom pattern already breaking out; MLEdge is essentially flat (0.09%) rather than negative, so no model disagreement. Best combination of score and R:R on the list.
